title: Cytotechnologist
description: The Broad Institute is seeking a Cytotechnologist to support our genomic and cellular research initiatives. You'll perform microscopic examinations and prepare cell specimens for advanced research applications. This role is critical to our mission of advancing biomedical science and developing new therapeutic approaches.
responsibilities: Prepare, stain, and examine cell and tissue specimens using microscopic techniques
Perform quality assurance on laboratory processes and cell preparations
Maintain detailed records of specimen data and analysis results
Collaborate with research scientists to understand analytical requirements
Prepare reports and documentation supporting research findings

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Cytotechnology or Bachelor's degree in life sciences field
skills: Proficiency with microscopy and cell preparation techniques
Strong attention to detail and accuracy
Understanding of cell biology and staining procedures
Ability to follow strict laboratory protocols

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
